title: nuphar minima
intro: Nuphar minima, also known as the small water lily, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the Nuphar genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Nuphar minima include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or infusion, and its roots and leaves can be used to create herbal preparations, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
